results.title: Hsbc Holdings PLC Buys 19,788 Shares of Envista Holdings Corporation $NVST
results.description: Hsbc Holdings PLC raised its stake in shares of Envista Holdings Corporation (NYSE:NVST – Free Report) by 31.1% in the fourth quarter, Holdings Channel.com reports. The institutional investor owned 83,350 shares of the company’s stock after buying an additional 19,788 shares during the quarter.
